name: Orange Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat milk in a large heavy saucepan until warm.
2. Beat egg yolks with 1 cup sugar.
3. Stir in about 1 cup of the hot milk.
4. Quickly stir into the remaining hot milk and cook over very low heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture thickens and coats the back of a metal spoon.
5. Remove from heat and stir in vanilla extract.
6. Chill the mixture.
7. Add undiluted orange juice concentrate and stir to combine.
8. Pour into a punch bowl.
9. Beat egg whites with a mixer until foamy.
10. Gradually add 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons at a time, and continue beating until stiff peaks form.
11. Float heaping tablespoons of meringue on top of the eggnog.
12. Garnish with orange sections.
